name: Guard Golem
description: An ancient sentinel awakened from eternal slumber. It knows no mercy, only duty.

name: Mulgoon
description: A savage beast king. His roar alone can shatter steel and break spirits.

name: Igneus
description: The Flame General who commands the volcanic legions. His anger burns eternal.

name: Gemma
description: The crystal guardian whose body reflects a thousand deadly lights. Her beauty is mesmerizing and lethal.

name: Finstern
description: The Dragon of the abyss. It devours light and leaves only darkness in its wake.

name: Pisteus
description: A faithful guardian corrupted by dark magic. He now protects the very evil he once fought against.

name: Castilia
description: The Artificial Spirit created by the researchers. Her power rivals that of ancient gods.

name: Hexter
description: A sinister being that wields dark curses. Those who face it often lose their minds before their lives.

name: Neo Maton Sword
description: A mechanical warrior from a lost civilization. Its blade can cut through dimensions.

name: Etoise
description: The Shadow Assassin who moves unseen. No one has ever witnessed her true form.
